cliomicplot: Publication-Ready Visualizations for Clinical and Multi-Omics Data

Source: R/cliomicplot-package.R
cliomicplot-package.Rd

cliomicplot provides high-quality, publication-ready visualizations for clinical and multi-omics data analysis. Built on ggplot2, it offers specialized plot types and journal-specific themes.

Design Philosophy

The API design draws on patterns established in the broader R graphics ecosystem — including the formula interface popularized by base R's plot() and the type-system approach used in several modern graphics packages. Colour palettes are curated from published journal style guides and open-source bioinformatics tools; see the package REFERENCES for full attributions.

Main Functions

  • cliplot - Main plotting function

  • cliplot_add - Add layers to existing plot

  • clitheme - Set plot themes

  • clipar - Set/query graphical parameters

Plot Types

  • Clinical: type_volcano, type_forest, type_km, type_waterfall, type_swimmer

  • Omics: type_heatmap, type_pca, type_ma, type_correlation, type_boxplot, type_violin

  • Gallery: type_ridge, type_lm, type_loess, type_spineplot, type_rug, type_abline, type_qq

  • R Graph Gallery: type_chord, type_treemap, type_streamgraph, type_connected, type_circular_bar, type_density2d, type_parallel, type_dendrogram

  • Premier: type_raincloud, type_dumbbell, type_lollipop, type_beeswarm, type_radar, type_alluvial, type_waffle

  • Basic: type_points, type_jitter, type_barplot, type_lines, type_histogram, type_density, type_errorbar, type_ribbon, type_text, type_bubble

  • Interactive: cliplot_interactive for plotly-powered zoom/pan/hover

  • Infographic: type_trials, type_infobar for media-ready pipeline and polling-style charts

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/vanhungtrantran/cliomicplot

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/vanhungtran/cliomicplot/issues
